channel.title: python on Julian Xhokaxhiu's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in python on Julian Xhokaxhiu's Blog

item.title: ProjectTreeTemplater: a new Sublime Text 2 plugin to manage your Project tree
item.description: Hi there, this is another post update and this I would like to talk to you regarding my new little Python project I’ve made those days which is called ProjectTreeTemplater.
